verses.text: Miriam dies at Kadesh; there is no water. No water. Trial returns to the people.
Miriam dies at Kadesh; there is no water. No water. Trial returns to the people.
The people chide, wishing they had died. Murmuring. They forget God's care.
The people chide, wishing they had died. Murmuring. They forget God's care.
The people chide, wishing they had died. Murmuring. They forget God's care.
God bids Moses speak to the rock to give water. The command. God provides again.
God bids Moses speak to the rock to give water. The command. God provides again.
God bids Moses speak to the rock to give water. The command. God provides again.
Moses, angry, smites the rock twice; water gushes out. Smitten. He acts in wrath, not faith.
Moses, angry, smites the rock twice; water gushes out. Smitten. He acts in wrath, not faith.
Moses, angry, smites the rock twice; water gushes out. Smitten. He acts in wrath, not faith.
God says they shall not bring the people in, for unbelief. Barred. Even Moses falls short.
God says they shall not bring the people in, for unbelief. Barred. Even Moses falls short.
Moses asks Edom for passage; they refuse. Refused. The brother turns them away.
Moses asks Edom for passage; they refuse. Refused. The brother turns them away.
Moses asks Edom for passage; they refuse. Refused. The brother turns them away.
Moses asks Edom for passage; they refuse. Refused. The brother turns them away.
Edom comes out with force; Israel turns aside. Turned. They avoid needless war.
Edom comes out with force; Israel turns aside. Turned. They avoid needless war.
Edom comes out with force; Israel turns aside. Turned. They avoid needless war.
Edom comes out with force; Israel turns aside. Turned. They avoid needless war.
At Mount Hor, Aaron must die, for he too rebelled. Aaron's end. The priest's sin bars him too.
At Mount Hor, Aaron must die, for he too rebelled. Aaron's end. The priest's sin bars him too.
At Mount Hor, Aaron must die, for he too rebelled. Aaron's end. The priest's sin bars him too.
Aaron's garments pass to Eleazar; Aaron dies, and Israel mourns. Succession. The priesthood goes on.
Aaron's garments pass to Eleazar; Aaron dies, and Israel mourns. Succession. The priesthood goes on.
